sn47.2:1.1: At one time, the *Bhagavā* was dwelling at Vesālī, in Ambapālī’s Grove.
sn47.2:2.1: “Bhikkhus, a *bhikkhu* should dwell with *sati* [*sato*], fully aware [*sampajāno*].
sn47.2:2.2: This is our instruction for you.
sn47.2:2.3: And how, bhikkhus, is a *bhikkhu* with *sati* [*sato*]?
sn47.2:2.4: Here, bhikkhus, a *bhikkhu* dwells contemplating body in body, ardent, fully aware [*sampajāno*], with *sati* [*satimā*], having removed longing and distress regarding the world;
sn47.2:2.7: he dwells contemplating *dhammas* in *dhammas*, ardent, fully aware [*sampajāno*], with *sati* [*satimā*], having removed longing and distress regarding the world.
sn47.2:2.8: That is how, bhikkhus, a *bhikkhu* is with *sati* [*sato*].
sn47.2:3.1: And how, bhikkhus, is a *bhikkhu* fully aware [*sampajāno*]?
sn47.2:3.2: Here, bhikkhus, a *bhikkhu* acts with full awareness [*sampajānakārī*] when going forward and returning; he acts with full awareness [*sampajānakārī*] when looking ahead and looking away; he acts with full awareness [*sampajānakārī*] when bending and stretching; he acts with full awareness [*sampajānakārī*] in wearing his cloak and robes and carrying his bowl; he acts with full awareness [*sampajānakārī*] when eating, drinking, chewing, and tasting; he acts with full awareness [*sampajānakārī*] when defecating and urinating; he acts with full awareness [*sampajānakārī*] when walking, standing, sitting, sleeping, waking, speaking, and keeping silent.
sn47.2:3.3: That is how, bhikkhus, a *bhikkhu* acts with full awareness [*sampajānakārī*].
sn47.2:3.4: Bhikkhus, a *bhikkhu* should dwell with *sati* [*sato*], fully aware [*sampajāno*].
sn47.2:3.5: This is our instruction for you.”
